##### `circleci mcp vscode list [flags]`

Show VSCode MCP servers

| Flag                   | Description                                                              |
| ---------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `--config-path string` | Path to VSCode config file                                               |
| `--workspace`          | List from workspace settings (.vscode/mcp.json) instead of user settings |
